import json
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('articles/2026/03/11/articles.jsonl')
queries={
'kc135_country':['kc-135','refueling aircraft','refuelling aircraft','western iraq','base','al-harir','ain al-asad','iraq','al udeid','prince sultan'],
'island':['qeshm','kharg','kish','iranian island','trump','military installations'],
'ship':['3,500','3500','us military personnel','uss bataan','uss wasp','amphibious','middle east','marine expeditionary'],
'healthcentre':['health centre','health center','medical workers','southern lebanon','mays al-jabal','taybeh','maifadoun','kill 12','killed 12'],
'afc':['afc women','asian cup','quarterfinal','north korea','australia','taiwan','uzbekistan','world cup qualifying','south korea'],
'spain_friendly':['spain','friendly','march 27','argentina','brazil','world cup 2026','national team'],
'launch_area':['launch area','launchpad','foreign minister','araghchi','al-dhafra','airspace','territory','used as'],
}
for name,terms in queries.items():
    print('###',name)
    shown=0
    for i,line in enumerate(p.open(),1):
        art=json.loads(line)
        text=((art.get('title') or '')+' '+(art.get('content') or '')).replace('\\n',' ')
        low=text.lower()
        score=sum(1 for t in terms if t in low)
        if score>=2:
            print(f'LINE {i} {art.get(\"date_publish\")} {art.get(\"source\")} {art.get(\"title\")} score={score}')
            for t in terms:
                idx=low.find(t)
                if idx>=0:
                    print(text[max(0,idx-240):idx+780])
                    break
            print('---')
            shown+=1
            if shown>=10: break
    if shown==0: print('no hits')
PY"
